# ChatBot24 — LLM Context File
# https://chatbot24.su/llms.txt

## About
ChatBot24 is a Russian AI chatbot development agency specializing in business automation. 
We create custom chatbots for Telegram, WhatsApp, and VKontakte using GPT-4 and machine learning.

## Services
- AI chatbot development (3-14 days delivery)
- CRM integration (Bitrix24, AmoCRM)
- 24/7 customer support automation
- Sales funnel optimization
- Multi-platform deployment (Telegram, WhatsApp, VK, Web)

## Pricing
- Lite: 19,900 ₽ (basic chatbot)
- Base: 39,000 ₽ (popular, includes CRM)
- AI-Assist: 129,000 ₽ (GPT-4 powered)
- Enterprise: from 249,000 ₽ (custom SLA)

## Contact
- Phone: +7 (993) 336-61-02
- Website: https://chatbot24.su
- Email: info@chatbot24.su
- VK: https://vk.com/club237277911

## Key Features
- 80% of routine inquiries automated
- 24/7 availability
- Human handoff for complex cases
- Real-time analytics dashboard
- 12-month code warranty

## Target Industries
- E-commerce
- Service companies
- Education
- Healthcare
- HoReCa

## Technologies
- GPT-4, Claude, YandexGPT
- Node.js, Python
- React, Next.js
- PostgreSQL, Redis
- Docker, Kubernetes
